title: 皐月賞の後に・勝利、でも

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, this is the distance I'm best at. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay! Next time, I'll definitely take first!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I know what I did wrong, so I won't run like that
again.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now it's time to get some training done! Go,
Teio, go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: How? How can she stand back up so quickly?
